title: Nuāgē Active Hands Tough Hand Cream for Extremely Dry, Cracked Skin | Fast-Absorbing, Non-Greasy Formula | Intense Moisturiser for Hardworking Hands (150g)
features: INTENSIVE CARE FOR HARDWORKING HANDS: This tough hand cream is specially formulated for extremely dry and cracked skin. Ideal after gardening, DIY, or outdoor work, it hydrates deeply to restore comfort and flexibility.
FAST-ABSORBING & NON-GREASY: Designed with a quick-absorbing formula, this moisturising cream sinks in quickly without leaving hands sticky. Great for use during busy days or before bed.
SOOTHES CRACKED & ROUGH SKIN: Helps repair cracked knuckles, rough fingertips, and dry patches. Use after exposure to wind, cold weather, or frequent washing to soothe and soften.
PERFECT FOR DAILY USE: Gentle enough to be used throughout the day, yet powerful enough to treat tough skin. Keep it on a desk, in a toolbox, or next to the kitchen sink for regular use.
IDEAL HAND CREAM FOR MEN AND WOMEN: With a neutral scent and powerful performance, this cream is loved by both men and women. A great choice for households with multiple users.
GREAT SIZE FOR HOME & WORK: The generous 150g tub offers long-lasting value. Keep one in the workshop or bathroom to ensure hands stay smooth, soft, and cared for all year round.
description: Product description Nuāgē Active Hands Tough Hand Cream for Extremely Dry, Cracked Skin | Fast-Absorbing, Non-Greasy Formula | Intense Moisturiser for Hardworking Hands (150g) Ingredients Aqua, Stearic Acid, Petrolatum, Glycerin, Paraffin, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Glyceryl Stearate, Paraffinum Liquidum, Polysorbate 80, Phenoxyethanol, Carbomer, Hydroxyacetophenone, Sodium Hydroxide, Hydroxpropyl Methylcellulose, Allantoin, Sodium Benzoate, Tocopheryl (Vitamin E) Acetate, Ethylhexylglycerin. Directions Using a small amount, rub into hands as required. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If eye contact occurs rinse thoroughly with water. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
